TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Kdusan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 364 buwan, 1,201 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,069 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 132 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 70%, Amis 9%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, Setik 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kdusan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kdusan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kdusan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kdusan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kdusan hya' ga Qowgan. tay mkyahu' na Kdusan hya' ga Kulu. tuqi' na qsya' cyux qwis na gong qu qalang. mtasaw balay qu llyung na qalang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ k*us~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa qowɣan. taj mkjaħuʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa kulu. tuqiʔ na qs~ɕjaʔ ʦ~ʨjux qwis~ɕ na ɣoŋ qu qalaŋ. mtas~ɕaw βalaj qu lljuŋ na qalaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Kdusan ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 364 buwan, 1,201 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 89% kyan ku 1,069 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 11% kyan ku 132 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku 70%, Amis 9%, Tayan 3%, Bunun 1%, Setik 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kdusan hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Kdusan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Kdusan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kdusan hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Kdusan hya' ga Qowgan. tay mkyahu' na Kdusan hya' ga Kulu. tuqi' na qsya' cyux qwis na gong qu qalang. mtasaw balay qu llyung na qalang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ k*us~ɕan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku **%, amis~ɕ *%, tajan *%, βunun *%, s~ɕetik *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa qowɣan. taj mkjaħuʔ na k*us~ɕan ħjaʔ ɣa kulu. tuqiʔ na qs~ɕjaʔ ʦ~ʨjux qwis~ɕ na ɣoŋ qu qalaŋ. mtas~ɕaw βalaj qu lljuŋ na qalaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
